On this page

This is a *deprecated* syntax to prepare the database for a full backup or a filesystem (disk) snapshot.
`SNAPSHOT` SQL syntax has been superceded by [`CHECKPOINT` SQL syntax](/docs/query/sql/checkpoint/)

*For a detailed guide backup creation and restoration? Check out our
[Backup and Restore](/docs/operations/backup/) guide!*

## Syntax[​](#syntax "Direct link to Syntax")

![Flow chart showing the syntax of the SNAPSHOT keyword](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)
